name: deerrecall
description: Static DeerRecall MVP prototype with Harness-compatible Docker Compose delivery.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check motion.js && node --check server/llm-gateway.mjs && node --check server/server.mjs && node --check desktop/ai-gateway.cjs && npm test
scripts.test: node --test tests/homepage-structure.test.js tests/ai-market-insight.test.mjs tests/local-resume-library.test.cjs tests/desktop-ai-gateway.test.cjs tests/deersearch-engine.test.cjs
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dir
scripts.desktop:build:trial: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg
